leadText: The Sail Fossil (Japanese: ヒレのカセキ Fin Fossil) is a fossil introduced in Generation VI that can be regenerated into Amaura. It is the counterpart of the Jaw Fossil.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Passive effect [ edit | edit source ] If brought to the one of the following locations, the Sail Fossil can be regenerated into an Amaura . Games Location X Y Ambrette Town Fossil Lab OR AS Devon Corporation in Rustboro City S M US UM Fossil Restoration Center on Route 8 ZA Pokémon Research Lab

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods X Y Glittering Cave (choice between this and the Jaw Fossil ) OR AS Trade S M Trade US UM Konikoni City ( Olivia's jewelry shop ) UM Poké Pelago (Isle Aphun: Rare-Treasure Hunting, Interesting-Item Hunting) ZA Stone Emporium

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V ZA A fossil from a prehistoric Pokémon that once lived on land. It looks like the impression from a skin sail.
